text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian's terrific performance awes the crowd
and ignites the fighting spirit of Hishi Amazon,
who'd been watching from the stands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian wants even more strength. To this
end, I recommend the Classic Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Certain the path to growing stronger lies in facing
strong opponents, we fix our sights on the Satsuki
Sho.
